tagline: The following notebook improvements are now available: The cell execution minimap now appears in the right margin of notebooks.
what_it_does: The following notebook improvements are now available: The cell execution minimap now appears in the right margin of notebooks. Use the minimap to get a visual overview of your notebook's run status and quickly navigate between cells. Use Databricks Assistant to help diagnose and fix environment errors, including library installation errors.
why_it_matters: The following notebook improvements are now available: The cell execution minimap now appears in the right margin of notebooks.
key_takeaway: The following notebook improvements are now available: The cell execution minimap now appears in the right margin of notebooks.
